title: Sakura
description: Pink Crystal PvP resourcepack for modern minecraft versions with audio
body:
🌸 **Sakura Crystal PvP Pack | 16x | FPS Boost | Custom Sounds | Low Fire**               
Bring elegance to your PvP experience with the Sakura Crystal PvP Pack, a refined 16x texture pack designed for competitive players who want both beauty and performance. Inspired by the delicate cherry blossom (sakura) aesthetic and merged with the intensity of crystal PvP, this pack offers a smooth, immersive combat experience.

✨ Features:
Sakura-Themed Visuals: Soft pink accents and subtle textures reimagine traditional PvP gear in a graceful sakura style.
 
1. Crystal PvP Optimized: Custom low-latency visuals for clear hit detection and faster reaction time.
2. FPS Friendly: Lightweight 16x resolution for enhanced performance on low- to mid-range systems.
3. Custom Sounds: Unique audio for hits, blocks, and breaking crystals—tailored for PvP intensity.
4. Integrated Low Fire: Improved visibility during combat with a sleek, minimal fire overlay.
5. Beautiful sky texture: use [FabricSkyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) to get it working

_Whether you're on anarchy servers or hosting competitive duels, Sakura Crystal gives you the edge—with style._
Need more packs? Join my [discord](https://discord.gg/8RDNrXfxc5)
